description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release-please that triggers on push to the master branch. Run a release-please job on ubuntu-latest with write permissions to repository contents and pull requests, using the googleapis/release-please-action with a MY_RELEASE_PLEASE_TOKEN from secrets. Then, run an upload-pypi job that depends on release-please, sets up Python 3.12, uses actions-poetry to run image, installs project dependencies with poetry, packages the project, and publishes it to PyPI using pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish.
